generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder on the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox‑mounted position encoder on the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – Data transmitted
instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxMountedEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data objects (raw and derived)
instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from motor‑mounted encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from gearbox‑mounted encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor current measurement (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque calculated from current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity of the axis (rad/s)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance AngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration of the axis (rad/s²)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for streaming sensor data from the SINUMERIK 840D controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink runtime executing simulation and calculation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService,
                     ParameterExtractionService,
                     MotionControlAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell representing components of the digital twin"
]

instance WebDashboardApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard displaying live sensor streams and model outputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterExtractionInsight
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous friction identification (static, kinetic, viscous) using combined white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterExtractionInsight
]

instance ParameterExtractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter extraction for model updating based on identified friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterExtractionInsight
]

instance MotionControlAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Support for motion‑control accuracy improvement by feeding updated friction parameters to the controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParameterExtractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extraction of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters for each gearbox"
]

instance MotionControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update the robot controller's motion‑control algorithms with new friction parameters to reduce positioning errors"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C10: Models (engineering, simulation, calculation)
instance SysMLAxisEngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing the first vertical axis architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance FrictionlessBehaviorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the axis without friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance StribeckFrictionSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model implementing Stribeck friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance DahlFrictionSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model implementing Dahl friction formulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance LuGreFrictionSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model implementing LuGre friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model deriving motor torque from current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance VelocityCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model deriving angular velocity from encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance AccelerationCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model deriving angular acceleration from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

// C15: Physical components (system under study)
instance FirstVerticalAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis"
]

instance GearwheelGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel gearbox attached to the vertical axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox attached to the vertical axis"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstVerticalAxisComponent,
                 PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorComponent,
                 GearwheelGearboxComponent,
                 CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; data are captured and processed at sensor update rates (implicit live streaming via MQTT) to enable online friction model updating."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of an Asset (first axis), Sources (sensors and derived data), Processing components (simulation and calculation models), Data Traces (measured and simulated), and a visualization service, all connected via one‑way data flow from the physical asset to the virtual representation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is applied during the operational stage of the robot to monitor and improve performance while the machine is in use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each Data Trace to its originating Sensor or Processing model; comparison of simulated (friction‑less) and measured data to quantify deviation; use of both analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) friction models to improve model fidelity; multi‑physics aware identification ensures physical plausibility."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data from the robot are transmitted to the digital shadow via MQTT protocol; no bidirectional protocol is defined."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for representing the robot components and their metadata."
]
